title: AURORA 33761 Soft Toy, Green & Blue,Medium, 5In
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Eve Earth cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: Product Description This cute Palm Pals Eve Earth fits into the palm of your hand, full of beans making this a super soft and cuddly soft toy. Eve Earth's body is a soft green & blue plush material. This is a super cute playful Eve Earth soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Eve Earth. Eve Earth is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
